creator: nwhitehorn@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The mountpoint field is filesystem-type dependent, as it says in the help 
field and the error box if you attempt to use it for a filesystem to which 
it does not apply (swap, bsdlabel containers). As such, it can't be 
conditionally present. Future changes to the add partition screen will 
hopefully allow conditional presence.
